---
name: Maintenance report
about: Track housekeeping, refactors, dependency upgrades, and other maintenance work
title: 'Maintenance: '
labels: maintenance, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Guidelines

Thank you for filing a maintenance task! Maintenance issues track housekeeping work that
keeps the project healthy: refactors, dependency upgrades, code cleanup, documentation
updates, infrastructure tweaks, etc.

### Type of Maintenance
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Dependency upgrade
- [ ] Code cleanup / dead code removal
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tooling / CI / build configuration
- [ ] Other (please describe)

### Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

### Motivation / Why now
Why is this maintenance needed? What problems does it prevent or solve?

### Affected Areas
List the files, modules, or systems affected by this work.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

### Risks / Roll-back plan
Describe risks and how to revert if something goes wrong.

### Priority
Please indicate priority by including one of: `critical`, `urgent`, `production`, `outage`,
`important`, `high`, `blocking`, `medium`, `normal`, `low`, `nice-to-have`, `minor` in the title or body
so the automation can label it correctly. Most maintenance tasks are `medium` or `low`.

### Additional context
Add any other context, links to discussions, or screenshots here.
